name: understand-anything-trae
description: An open-source tool combining LLM intelligence + static analysis to produce interactive dashboards for understanding codebases.
rawDescription: An open-source tool combining LLM intelligence + static analysis to produce interactive dashboards for understanding codebases.
readmeHead:
Understand Anything Trae

Turn any codebase, knowledge base, or docs into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about.
Works with Trae and Trae CN.

English | 简体中文
